description_long: This house features a modern, multi-level design with a mix of flat and slightly sloped roofs, and a prominent use of red brick and large glass windows. The structure includes several interconnected rectangular volumes, creating a dynamic and spacious layout. The front area has a paved driveway with two parked cars and is accented by palm trees and landscaped greenery. Multiple terraces and balconies are visible, offering outdoor living spaces and views of the surroundings. The windows are large and asymmetrically arranged, maximizing natural light and providing a contemporary aesthetic. The entryway is defined by a set of steps leading to a recessed main door, partially sheltered by an overhang.
description: A modern, multi-level brick house with large glass windows, flat roofs, and landscaped surroundings. Features include a paved driveway, terraces, and asymmetrical window arrangements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway with two cars, palm trees, and the prominent brick facade with large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, additional landscaping, and the extended layout of the house with multiple roof levels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying terraces, balconies, and a stepped garden area with more greenery and large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back of the garage, additional flat roof sections, and a mix of trees and open yard space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and some vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door accessed by steps, partially sheltered by an overhang, with minimalistic modern detailing
